heading: Reporting
label: 6307 Reporting
text: Not later than 48 business hours after the conclusion of a professional boxing match, the supervising boxing commission shall report the results of such boxing match and any related suspensions to each boxer registry.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .July 1, 1997section 23(2) of Pub. L. 104–272section 6301 of this title
